description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with two distinct rectangular volumes connected side by side, both topped with steep gable roofs. The exterior is clad in a dark material, likely metal or painted wood, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. Large windows are set asymmetrically into the roof and walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade includes a single, narrow door and a roof window, while the rear features a large, floor-to-ceiling glass wall that opens up the living space to the outside. The house sits on a light gray, tiled platform that serves as a base and possibly a patio area. The interior appears open and airy, with visible wooden flooring and minimal partitioning.
description: A modern, dark-clad house with two gabled volumes, large windows, and a glass rear wall, set on a tiled platform. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with asymmetrical window placement and open interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a roof window, and the dark, minimalist facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open glass wall at the rear and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, similar to view 0, highlighting the entry door and roof window from a mirrored angle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large, floor-to-ceiling glass wall and open interior space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass wall at rear
attribute_entryway_design: Narrow single door with minimal trim, flush to facade, no porch or steps, modern style
